solutions.solution:
Method I
∴ Angle traced by the hour hand in 12 h = 360°

So, angle traced by the hour hand in 8 h 50 min i.e., 53/6 h = (360/12 × 53/6) = 265°

∴ Angle traced by the minute hand in 60 min = 360°
∴ Angle traced by minute hand in 50 min = 360°/60 × 50 = 300°

∴ Required angle = (300° – 265°) = 35°
Method II
In the given question, hour hand is behind the minute hand. Also, given, n = 8, x = 50
Then, according to the formula,
∴ Required angle = |30(x/5 - n) - x/2| ⇒ |30(50/5 - 8) - 50/2| ⇒ (30 × 2 - 25)° = 35°
